findings.finding: Legacy RossCommandCenterSurface appears before canonical primary action.
findings.recommendation: Primary action must appear before legacy artifact panels.

findings.finding: Old ActionFirstDashboard is still rendered and asks a duplicate 'what should Ross do next?' question.
findings.recommendation: Remove or demote ActionFirstDashboard from Command Center.

findings.finding: UnitWorkSnapshotPanel still appears on Command Center and can compete with primary action.
findings.recommendation: Show unit work only as collapsed supporting context or move to separate page.

findings.finding: Full LeadQueue is still embedded on Command Center.
findings.recommendation: Replace with lead summary/link; keep full table on /operator/leads.

required_next_move: Remove duplicate ActionFirstDashboard and full LeadQueue from Command Center; keep canonical PrimaryActionPanel as the only top decision.

snapshot_primary_action.action_label: Follow up on real ShopiFixer offer and close payment.
evidence: Active proposal has direct revenue capture potential.
ShopiFixer is the current immediate one-time revenue path.
Ross-owned action can be advanced immediately.
Next action explicitly targets payment close.
Follow-up is the active bottleneck after offer send.
Merchant value proven: $100 gap between recovered value and Stafford revenue captured.
Current UX integrity score is 37; decision layer needed before further UI polish.
risk: Do not start delivery work before payment is captured.
Do not treat merchant recovered value as Stafford revenue.
Human judgment required before executing irreversible actions.
snapshot_primary_action.next_step: Follow up on real ShopiFixer offer and close payment.
snapshot_primary_action.expected_outcome: Move active ShopiFixer proposal toward paid client status.
